# Support — DevHeal Labs AI

## Getting Help

| Channel | Use it for |
|---------|-----------|
| [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/devheallabs-ai/nc/issues) | Bug reports and feature requests |
| [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/devheallabs-ai/nc/discussions) | Questions, ideas, and community chat |
| [NC Documentation](https://nc.devheallabs.in) | Installation, tutorials, and language reference |
| [NC UI Documentation](https://ncui.devheallabs.in) | Frontend framework guide |
| [NC AI Documentation](https://ncai.devheallabs.in) | AI SDK reference |

## Before Asking

1. Check the [documentation](https://nc.devheallabs.in) first.
2. Search [existing issues](https://github.com/devheallabs-ai/nc/issues) to see if your question was already answered.
3. Search [discussions](https://github.com/devheallabs-ai/nc/discussions) for community Q&A.

## Security Issues

**Do not open public issues for security vulnerabilities.** Please email [support@devheallabs.in](mailto:support@devheallabs.in). See our [Security Policy](SECURITY.md).
